items.title: (1/2) Last season, the Wizards' big-man rotation consisted primarily of Alex Sarr, Marvin Bagley III (before he was traded), Tristan Vukčević, Anthony Gill and whichever natural wing who wound up starting at the four (Khris Middleton or Justin Champagnie, for instance).
items.author: Josh Robbins
items.body_excerpt: (1/2) Last season, the Wizards' big-man rotation consisted primarily of Alex Sarr, Marvin Bagley III (before he was traded), Tristan Vukčević, Anthony Gill and whichever natural wing who wound up starting at the four (Khris Middleton or Justin Champagnie, for instance).
